channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Baseball star Ohtani's ex-interpreter to appear in court for sentencing in betting case
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — The former interpreter for Japanese baseball star Shohei Ohtani is expected to be sentenced Thursday for bank and tax fraud after he stole nearly $17 million from the Los Angeles Dodgers player’s bank account.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fox enjoys successful debut with Spurs as Wembanyama's point guard in win over Hawks
item.description: ATLANTA (AP) — De'Aaron Fox had a quick description of his first game as the point guard for 7-foot-3 Victor Wembanyama. “He is different,” Fox said. “He is special. Just the type of defensive attention he receives allows you to do things you don't normally do.
item.dc:creator: CHARLES ODUM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Deion Sanders says he "couldn't coach pro ball” in a recent episode of his television series
item.description: DENVER (AP) — Deion Sanders got right to the point in a segment of his new television series: “I couldn't coach pro ball," the Colorado Buffaloes coach maintained.
item.dc:creator: PAT GRAHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Wizards trading Valanciunas to the Kings for Cissoko and 2 2nd-round draft picks
item.description: The Washington Wizards have agreed to trade center Jonas Valanciunas to the Sacramento Kings for Sidy Cissoko and second-round draft picks in 2028 and 2029. The Wizards announced the trade Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: NOAH TRISTER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Plateau Valley’s Bevan Brothers Commit to Colorado Mesa
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — Two brothers from Plateau Valley High School are taking the next step in their athletic careers, and they won’t have to go far to do it. Jackson and Heston Bevan, both standout multi-sport athletes, are staying close to home.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Warriors to trade for Miami's Jimmy Butler: ESPN
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors are finalizing a blockbuster trade for Miami Heat star Jimmy Butler, ESPN reported Wednesday. Butler, 35, also agreed to an extension with the Warriors that will keep him with the team through the 2026-27 season, ESPN said.
item.dc:creator: Phil Mayer, KRON4

item.title: Trump vows Homeland Security will prevent transgender athletes from entering the country for 2028 LA Olympics
item.description: President Donald Trump said Kristi Noem will block any transgender athletes attempting to compete as women from entering the country for the Olympics in 2028.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Mahomes, Kelce and the Chiefs' quest for a three-peat faces its toughest challenge vs. the Eagles
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Patrick Mahomes, Travis Kelce and the Kansas City Chiefs are pursuing history and a few of Taylor Swift’s records. Saquon Barkley, Jalen Hurts and the Philadelphia Eagles stand in their way.
item.dc:creator: ROB MAADDI, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Mahomes reveals thoughts on Trump attending the Super Bowl
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs quarterback Patrick Mahomes was asked what it will feel like to play in front of a sitting president.
item.dc:creator: Geoff Petrulis, NewsNation

item.title: Celtics rally from 26-point deficit to top 76ers 118-110
item.description: Jayson Tatum scored 13 of his 35 points in the fourth quarter and the Boston Celtics rallied from a 26-point deficit to beat the Philadelphia 76ers 118-110 on Sunday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Rory McIlroy overpowers Pebble Beach and wins in a runaway
item.description: The combination of one of golf's biggest stars and America's most scenic coastal golf course was the just the spark the PGA Tour needed, and both lived up to their reputations Sunday in the AT&T Pebble Beach Pro-Am.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FERGUSON, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: South Carolina retires jersey number of three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson
item.description: Three-time WNBA MVP A’ja Wilson's South Carolina No. 22 jersey was hung in the rafters Sunday at Colonial Life Arena, her college home court that already features a statue of the program’s all-time leading scorer outside the main entrance.
item.dc:creator: PETE IACOBELLI, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Stunning trade sends Luka Doncic to Lakers, Anthony Davis to Mavericks
item.description: In what is one of the more surreal trades in the history of professional sports, the Los Angeles Lakers have sent away one of its franchise legends in exchange for a young superstar.
item.dc:creator: Austin Turner, KTLA 5

item.title: Girls Basketball: Oceanside 36, La Costa Canyon 31
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Girls basketball senior night for Oceanside hosting La Costa Canyon. Pirates squeak by the Mavericks 36-31.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Utah HC loses again in overtime, 3-2
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - It was yet another heartbreaking overtime loss for the Utah Hockey Club. Zach Werenski scored 61 seconds into overtime, and the Columbus Blue Jackets defeated the Utah Hockey Club 3-2 at Delta Center on Friday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Where to watch Super Bowl LIX in San Diego
item.description: Football fans who want to participate in the excitement of Super Bowl LIX without traveling to New Orleans or watching from their living room can watch the big game at several venues in San Diego.
item.dc:creator: Rhea Caoile, Fox 5

item.title: Dick Button, Olympic great and voice of skating, dies at 95
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Dick Button was more than the most accomplished men’s figure skater in history. He was one of his sport’s great innovators and promoters, the man responsible not only for inventing the flying camel spin but describing it to generations of fans.
item.dc:creator: BARRY WILNER and DAVE SKRETTA, Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: No Super Bowl rally if Kansas City Chiefs beat Philadelphia Eagles: Sources
item.description: Multiple sources have confirmed that should the Kansas City Chiefs win Super Bowl LIX, there will be no rally for the public.
item.dc:creator: Alyssa Mueller, NewsNation

item.title: Dwyane Wade reveals cancer diagnosis, kidney surgery
item.description: The Chicago native shared the story of the "shocking" diagnosis and the emotional toll it took on him on the latest episode of his 'The Why' podcast.
item.dc:creator: BJ Lutz, NewsNation

item.title: One of the Oklahoma's best high school wrestling team's season suspended
item.description: A disciplinary decision from the Oklahoma Secondary Schools Activities Association (OSSAA) has ended the season for the girls wrestling team at Edmond North High School.
item.dc:creator: Sydnee Batzlaff/KFOR, NewsNation
